subcodes.first_line: In this day the verses of grandeur are descending from the heaven of divine Will like unto a copious rain, and their fragrance perfumeth the realm of inner meaning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز آیات عظمت از سماء مشیت الهی بمثابه غیث هاطل نازل و عرفش عالم معانی و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
